case_title: BRIAN A JONES VS. BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF JONES, BRIAN A
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 WAIVED) SERVED JAN-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BRIAN A. JONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/29/19/. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,656.50 FILED BY JONES, BRIAN A AS TO DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BRIAN A. JONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, BRIAN A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2019
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, BRIAN A
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION COURT WILL CONTINUE CASE FOR 90 DAYS FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND TO ADD ADDITIONAL PARTY OR PARTIES, AND TO SERVE NEW CLAIM. COURT ALLOWS THIS OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND BECAUSE OF EXHIBIT A INTRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF. EXHIBIT A IS ENTITLED STIPENDS AND BONUS, AND STATES IN PART, "THE BONUS WILL BE AWARDED BASED UPON MERIT REVIEW OF CREW LEADS AND SUPERVISORS AND PRORATED UPON PERFORMANCE. THE RATE WILL BE ANYWHERE FROM $2 TO $4 PER HOUR DEPENDING UPON YOUR REVIEW." DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD EXPRESS STAFFING IS A PAYROLL SERVICE NOT AN EMPLOYER. PLAINTIFF MAY ADD THE EMPLOYER, AUTHOR OF EXHIBIT A. DEFENDANT BILL NEUFELD OF EXPRESS STAFFING MAY APPEAR, UPON HIS REQUEST, TELEPHONICALLY.FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-24-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. HONORABLE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THAT
